---
title: "Presentations & Writing"
description: ""
listing:
- id: presentations
  include:
    type: "presentations"
  contents: talks.yaml
  template: research.ejs
  filter-ui: false
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
- id: media
  include:
    type: "media"
  contents: talks.yaml
  template: research.ejs
  filter-ui: false
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

## Conferences & Presentations

:::{#presentations}
:::

## Public Writing

:::{#media}
:::
